text.message: idk, just feeling bored and trying to dramatize
Blues setup is op. If we don't gang rob them it's a runaway.
technically, but in south africa it's slang for awesome/sick/great/cool. It's our everything word
Close enough.  I'm working of dutch/German from 30 years back
i chose my first placement poorly
was hoping to take that 2 6 9 spot
i'm here for the drama ladies and gentleman
pretty good actually if you get 8 3 with it
exactly. That's what i wanted the 2 6 9
this setup not good enough to win tho
But my parents taught me to never give up
the thing is if black gets the wheat brick spot we are cooked
black, i dare you to take the 11 12 spot
i will trade you wood and ore
tough way to start with the double rob red
red building a lot of roads for someone who doesnt farm forests
And guy with no weed dropping cities like they're hot
I've done basically nothing and can't get a trade to save my life
the gods have turned against you black
Why have you turned against me God
Told you before we started you had the god position
red, we had such a good thing going
cant be too nice to you
i tried letting u win last game
it was my alter ego playing last game
What time is in in s africa?
someone must put a stop to this madness
how am I better than you?
not nice, it made me believe I had a chance for a sec haha
lol, you are porbalby ahead of me
blacks setup still real good tho
I think black you and I are doing good but red is ahead now to me
blue is just far ahead of everyone
blue can just take road from me whenever
he's such a generous player haha
lets go black! COMING ON STRONG
nah, im rooting for black now
red, we gotta get back to the original plan. I give you wood, you give me whatever i need
we know you will get road blue
black prints cities and green about to win but im the steal
the pain is too much to bear
can someone feed me brick and wood to plow black?
would remove him the settle spot
God likes to give you hope and take it away
sneaky green goblin trying to pull off a surprise upset?
I will hold you responsible for global warming blue
i love stuff, therefor the trees must go
I went from nine cards down to one over three turns without building anything
Is that sacrifice enough for the god
did you make any sacrifices or say prayers?
were you naught or nice this year?
